Title: Python Tutorial: Understanding and Preventing Identity Theft

Introduction:
Identity theft is a serious issue that can cause significant financial and personal damage. With the increasing use of technology, understanding how your information is protected becomes more crucial. Python, as a powerful programming language, provides tools that can help in detecting suspicious activities and protecting sensitive data. In this tutorial, you will learn about basic concepts and techniques related to identifying potential threats and safeguarding your identity using Python.

### Step 1: Understanding Identity Theft
